'''âsh-w-j-w''' ('''kashawjewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photoassimilate|photoassimilate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-j-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photoassimilate|photoassimilate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-w-j-w
|-
! Lemma
| kashawjewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishawjewoko|thishawjewoko]] || [[word:jishawjewoko|jishawjewoko]] || [[word:shishawjewoko|shishawjewoko]] || [[word:kishawjewoko|kishawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushawjewoko|thuthushawjewoko]] || [[word:jujushawjewoko|jujushawjewoko]] || [[word:shushushawjewoko|shushushawjewoko]] || [[word:kukushawjewoko|kukushawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushawjewoko|thushawjewoko]] || [[word:jushawjewoko|jushawjewoko]] || [[word:shushawjewoko|shushawjewoko]] || [[word:kushawjewoko|kushawjewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushawjewoko|thushawjewoko]] || [[word:jushawjewoko|jushawjewoko]] || [[word:shushawjewoko|shushawjewoko]] || [[word:kushawjewoko|kushawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshawjewoko|theshawjewoko]] || [[word:jeshawjewoko|jeshawjewoko]] || [[word:sheshawjewoko|sheshawjewoko]] || [[word:keshawjewoko|keshawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshawjewoko|thothoshawjewoko]] || [[word:jojoshawjewoko|jojoshawjewoko]] || [[word:shoshoshawjewoko|shoshoshawjewoko]] || [[word:kokoshawjewoko|kokoshawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshawjewoko|thoshawjewoko]] || [[word:joshawjewoko|joshawjewoko]] || [[word:shoshawjewoko|shoshawjewoko]] || [[word:koshawjewoko|koshawjewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshawjewoko|thoshawjewoko]] || [[word:joshawjewoko|joshawjewoko]] || [[word:shoshawjewoko|shoshawjewoko]] || [[word:koshawjewoko|koshawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshawjewoko|thĂŠshawjewoko]] || [[word:jĂŠshawjewoko|jĂŠshawjewoko]] || [[word:shĂŠshawjewoko|shĂŠshawjewoko]] || [[word:kĂŠshawjewoko|kĂŠshawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashawjewoko|thathashawjewoko]] || [[word:jajashawjewoko|jajashawjewoko]] || [[word:shashashawjewoko|shashashawjewoko]] || [[word:kakashawjewoko|kakashawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashawjewoko|thashawjewoko]] || [[word:jashawjewoko|jashawjewoko]] || [[word:shashawjewoko|shashawjewoko]] || [[word:kashawjewoko|kashawjewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashawjewoko|thashawjewoko]] || [[word:jashawjewoko|jashawjewoko]] || [[word:shashawjewoko|shashawjewoko]] || [[word:kashawjewoko|kashawjewoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shashawjewithi|shashawjewithi]] || [[word:shashawjewiji|shashawjewiji]] || [[word:shashawjewishi|shashawjewishi]] || [[word:shashawjewiki|shashawjewiki]]
